last_report: Difficult slate tonight — 2 confirmed line anomalies (OKC/UTA at 1.02, CLE/IND at 1.08 with dual franchise absences), multiple tank matchups, and widespread injury degradation. Injury feed source is NBA official PDF (22 teams) — full confidence rules apply. Pace data available for all teams. Two clean picks drafted: Boston -9.5 (strong L15 gap + Toronto without Quickley) and Houston ML at 2.35 (elite L15 form +46.1, GSW tank-watch, Steph Curry Questionable). Charlotte/MIN deferred to Commit pending Edwards (Questionable) status — if Edwards OUT, Charlotte ML becomes a strong play. OKC/UTA and CLE/IND flagged as anomalies for Commit investigation (star rest and dual absence pricing respectively). Total drafted: 2 confirmed picks, 1 deferred.

rejected_games.reason: Both teams confirmed tank-tier (WAS 17-60, BKN 18-59). Brooklyn ML 1.63 below target floor 1.70; WAS ML 2.32 in range but Washington is confirmed full-tank with Davis, Russell, Sarr, Young all OUT — do not bet WAS to win. Brooklyn odds 1.63 below ML floor. Spread odds in range but injury coverage uncertainty on both sides with multiple GTD players (Champagnie, Coulibaly, Tre Johnson on WAS). NetRtg L15: BKN -38.8 vs WAS -35.2 — both deeply negative. No reliable edge direction; tank vs tank game with corrupted lines.

Phoenix ML 1.22 far below target floor 1.70 — no bet on PHX. Chicago ML 4.35 above target ceiling 2.50 and Chicago is confirmed tank-tier (29-48, L10: 2-8, L15: -53.7 extremely negative). Phoenix road, L10: 3-7 — cold fade candidate but odds too short to bet. No valid market entry.

Milwaukee ML 1.40 below target floor 1.70. Milwaukee missing Giannis (OUT — hyperextension), Bobby Portis OUT, Gary Trent Jr. OUT. Memphis ML 3.00 in range but Memphis tank-tier (25-52, L10: 2-8, L15: -48.9). Betting Memphis at 3.00 against depleted Bucks without Giannis is tempting but Memphis is confirmed tank with terrible L15. Bucks despite injuries still have home court. No clear edge with both teams degraded.

ANOMALY: CLE ML 1.08 implies 93% probability — but CLE missing Allen AND Mobley (both confirmed OUT via NBA official PDF). Pacers also heavily depleted (Haliburton OUT, McConnell OUT, Nembhard OUT, Nesmith OUT, Furphy OUT). Indiana ML 8.00 well above target ceiling. CLE at 1.08 is extreme line possibly not fully pricing dual big man absence. Spread -15.5 is extreme. Line anomaly flagged — CLE priced as massive favourite despite franchise player absences. Indiana also extremely depleted. Tank vs depleted game with anomalous pricing. No bet — flag for Commit.

rejected_games.match: Oklahoma City Thunder vs Utah Jazz
rejected_games.reason: LINE ANOMALY: OKC priced at 1.02 ML (≤ 1.35 threshold met), spread -24.0. Both markets outside target ranges. ML 1.02 far below 1.70 floor. Utah confirmed tank (21-57, L10: 1-9). OKC elite (61-16) but star rest risk is HIGH with postseason clinch near — Thomas Sorber OUT. No valid bet market. Flagged as anomaly for Commit to investigate potential star rest.

rejected_games.match: Los Angeles Lakers vs Dallas Mavericks
rejected_games.reason: Interesting matchup but LAL severely depleted (Doncic OUT, Reaves OUT, Smart OUT, Vanderbilt Questionable — confirmed via NBA official). LAL ML 2.04 in range but franchise player absences disqualify without re-verification — skills explicitly state 'do NOT bet LAL ML without re-verification'. Dallas also tank-tier (24-53, L10: 2-8) with Kyrie Irving OUT, Lively OUT, Martin OUT. LAL L15: +8.0 vs DAL L15: -37.1 — LAL still better L15 but depleted roster. Dallas at 1.80 in range but tank team. Both teams too compromised for confident pick. LAL at 2.04 could have value but injury uncertainty too high for reliable EV calculation. Rejected — too many unknowns.

rejected_games.match: New Orleans Pelicans vs Orlando Magic
rejected_games.reason: Both teams negative NetRtg. NOP L15: -41.3, ORL L15: -31.8. NOP 25-53, ORL 41-36. NOP ML 1.50 below target floor 1.70. ORL ML 2.65 above target ceiling 2.50. NOP Dejounte Murray Questionable, Trey Murphy Questionable — injury uncertainty. Orlando L10: 3-7, cold stretch. Neither team has clear edge signal at available odds.

Charlotte ML 1.79 marginally below 1.80 floor (borderline). EV calculated at 0.038 — fails 5% minimum EV requirement. Anthony Edwards Questionable for MIN; if confirmed OUT at Commit phase, EV rises to strong territory. DEFERRED to Commit — pending Edwards injury status. Charlotte L15 +44.0 vs MIN L15 -4.0 is massive gap favoring Charlotte.

Sacramento ML 6.40 far above target ceiling 2.50. Clippers ML 1.12 far below target floor 1.70. Sacramento worst record in West (21-57), confirmed tank. Clippers advanced stats unavailable — cannot evaluate spread. Extreme odds with no valid market entry.
